items.description: Research and compile a list of tools used for scanning WiFi networks for vulnerabilities.
Identify common methods employed in the scanning phase of WiFi networks.
Gather case studies or examples of vulnerabilities discovered through WiFi scanning.
Analyze the effectiveness of different tools and methods in identifying vulnerabilities.
Compile findings into a structured report with references.
